name: Dodomon
description: A Slime Digimon whose whole body is covered in the tough fur " Mithril Hair ". It exhibits an aggressive personality immediately after being born, and despite its fangs not yet being grown, it threatens enemies by opening its mouth wide and doing a biting motion. Because of this behaviour, it often gets defeated by other Digimon, which explains why this Digimon is so rare. If an opponent approaches, it attacks by spitting " Chīsana Tetsuryū " from its mouth.
